extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won Stage 3 sprint after waiting patiently and opening afterburners with 100m remaining, beating rivals by two clear lengths.
tactical_patterns: Bora-hansgrohe timed leadout perfectly at 2km, positioning earlier than rivals who moved too late in messy finale.
Sunweb's Theuns pulled off Bol's wheel prematurely, leaving sprinter Walscheid isolated and lost in finale despite teammate effort.
Bennett demonstrated tactical patience by staying fourth wheel until 100m, exploiting others' early acceleration at high speed.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Showed elite sprint timing discipline, waiting until 100m at 70kph to open sprint, winning by two lengths.
rider_signals.WALSCHEID Maximilian: negative: Lost in finale despite Sunweb positioning effort, revealing team coordination weakness in chaotic sprint.
rider_signals.THEUNS Edward: neutral: Took second but appeared disappointed, suggesting Trek-Segafredo expected more despite strong positioning.
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: Race leader defending yellow at career tail-end shows durability despite being 39, unusual GC resilience.
